title: Hedgehog Companion
description: This mod adds an adorable 🦔 Hedgehog Companion to your Minecraft world!
body:
This mod adds an adorable 🦔 Hedgehog Companion to your Minecraft world!

🌾 Found in Plains and a few other biomes, these tiny and charming hedgehogs wander the grass, waiting for a kind player to tame them.

🍎 Simply feed a hedgehog an apple to tame it. Once tamed, it will faithfully follow you anywhere, never taking damage and always staying by your side.

🎒 Your hedgehog also has a small inventory you can use — perfect for carrying a few extra items on your adventures!

🌟 With its cute animations and helpful nature, the Hedgehog Companion is a delightful addition to your journeys.

⚒️ Note: This mod requires Geckolib (for Minecraft 1.20.1) to work properly. Please install Geckolib as a dependency!
